name: Jalapeno Pepper Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the ingredients in a blender and blend until soupy.
2. In a large pan, mix 6 cups sugar with the pepper mixture.
3. Rinse out the blender with another 1/2 cup cider vinegar and pour into the pepper and sugar mixture.
4. Bring to a full boil. Add 2 packets Certo.
5. Add food coloring, if desired. Bring to a boil again.
6. Turn off the heat and wait 5 minutes. Skim the top.
7. Pour into jelly glasses or jars.
8. Melt paraffin and place over the jelly, or use seal tops.
9. To serve, spread crackers with cream cheese and jelly.
